'''gofadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:phacellate|phacellate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phacellate|phacellate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gofadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gofadhithi|gofadhithi]] || [[word:gofadhiji|gofadhiji]] || [[word:gofadhishi|gofadhishi]] || [[word:gofadhiki|gofadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gofadhuthuthu|gofadhuthuthu]] || [[word:gofadhujuju|gofadhujuju]] || [[word:gofadhushushu|gofadhushushu]] || [[word:gofadhukuku|gofadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gofadhuthu|gofadhuthu]] || [[word:gofadhuju|gofadhuju]] || [[word:gofadhushu|gofadhushu]] || [[word:gofadhuku|gofadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gofadhufthuf|gofadhufthuf]] || [[word:gofadhufjuf|gofadhufjuf]] || [[word:gofadhufshuf|gofadhufshuf]] || [[word:gofadhufkuf|gofadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gofadhethe|gofadhethe]] || [[word:gofadheje|gofadheje]] || [[word:gofadheshe|gofadheshe]] || [[word:gofadheke|gofadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gofadhothotho|gofadhothotho]] || [[word:gofadhojojo|gofadhojojo]] || [[word:gofadhoshosho|gofadhoshosho]] || [[word:gofadhokoko|gofadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gofadhotho|gofadhotho]] || [[word:gofadhojo|gofadhojo]] || [[word:gofadhosho|gofadhosho]] || [[word:gofadhoko|gofadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gofadhofthof|gofadhofthof]] || [[word:gofadhofjof|gofadhofjof]] || [[word:gofadhofshof|gofadhofshof]] || [[word:gofadhofkof|gofadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gofadhïfthïf|gofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfjïf|gofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfshïf|gofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfkïf|gofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gofadhïfthïfthïf|gofadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfjïfjïf|gofadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfshïfshïf|gofadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfkïfkïf|gofadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gofadhïfthïf|gofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfjïf|gofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfshïf|gofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfkïf|gofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gofadhïfthïf|gofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfjïf|gofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfshïf|gofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:gofadhïfkïf|gofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gofadhæthæ|gofadhæthæ]] || [[word:gofadhæjæ|gofadhæjæ]] || [[word:gofadhæshæ|gofadhæshæ]] || [[word:gofadhækæ|gofadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gofadhathatha|gofadhathatha]] || [[word:gofadhajaja|gofadhajaja]] || [[word:gofadhashasha|gofadhashasha]] || [[word:gofadhakaka|gofadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gofadhatha|gofadhatha]] || [[word:gofadhaja|gofadhaja]] || [[word:gofadhasha|gofadhasha]] || [[word:gofadhaka|gofadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gofadhafthaf|gofadhafthaf]] || [[word:gofadhafjaf|gofadhafjaf]] || [[word:gofadhafshaf|gofadhafshaf]] || [[word:gofadhafkaf|gofadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gofadhasha|gofadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gofadhshësha|gofadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofadhrosha|gofadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofadhmusha|gofadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofadhyasha|gofadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogofadhnkshësha|gogofadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogofadhnkrosha|gogofadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogofadhnkmusha|gogofadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogofadhnkyasha|gogofadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gofafadhasha|gofafadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gofafadhshësha|gofafadhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofafadhrosha|gofafadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafadhmusha|gofafadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofafadhyasha|gofafadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogofafadhnkshësha|gogofafadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogofafadhnkrosha|gogofafadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogofafadhnkmusha|gogofafadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogofafadhnkyasha|gogofafadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gefædhasha|gefædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gefædhshësha|gefædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gefædhrosha|gefædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gefædhmusha|gefædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gefædhyasha|gefædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogefædhnkshësha|gogefædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogefædhnkrosha|gogefædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogefædhnkmusha|gogefædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogefædhnkyasha|gogefædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gofadhasha|gofadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gofadhshësha|gofadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofadhrosha|gofadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofadhmusha|gofadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofadhyasha|gofadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogofadhnkshësha|gogofadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogofadhnkrosha|gogofadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogofadhnkmusha|gogofadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogofadhnkyasha|gogofadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
